description: sandals from catwalk created for the ethnic fashionista. Pair these with ethnic wear or with form fitting jeans and matching accessories. Upper Synthetic leather strap for the midfoot with silver dust Synthetic leather toe holder with gold dust Leather footbed Outsole TPU outsole with kitten heels Textured design on forefoot and heel for added comfort Slipper Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
